title: Build deterministic examples and golden file seed corpus
description: Deterministic tests E1-E9 (pre-filter 40+ cases, git pack 30+ cases, allowlist/blocklist 30+ cases, env detection 30+ cases, policy matrix 15 cases, assessment aggregation, full pipeline 20+ cases, AnyName coverage, ArgContent/Regex split). Seed golden corpus 30-40 entries.
